## Accessibility checklist

- [ ] Interactive controls have ≥44×44 pt hit targets
- [ ] VoiceOver labels (and identifiers for UI tests) on new controls
- [ ] Decorative images/icons marked `accessibilityHidden`
- [ ] Honors Reduce Motion for any new animation
- [ ] Text/icons meet ≥4.5:1 contrast (default + High Contrast)
- [ ] Color is not the only cue for state or regions
